name: Kolaches - Cheese Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cottage cheese through a fine-mesh sieve or cheese cloth and press to remove as much liquid as possible.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the drained cottage cheese with the remaining ingredients: beaten egg, sugar, vanilla extract, salt, and melted butter.
3. Blend everything together until smooth and creamy.
Enjoy your kolaches!
